description_long: This is a rectangular, freestanding cabinet with a light, whitewashed wood finish and subtle vertical grain patterning. The front features two paneled doors with a slight recess and a pair of small, round metallic handles at the bottom center. The sides and top are flat and unadorned, with the same wood grain texture continuing seamlessly around the object. The back appears to be a plain, solid panel without any openings or features. The cabinet is of moderate height, suitable for use as a storage unit in urban environments such as garages, utility rooms, or public spaces. Its sturdy construction and neutral color make it versatile for various settings.
description: A light wood, freestanding cabinet with two paneled doors and metallic handles, featuring a subtle vertical grain pattern. The design is simple and functional, suitable for urban storage.
description_view_0: Front view showing two paneled doors with metallic handles at the bottom center.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying a plain, flat wood grain panel with no visible features.
description_view_2: Back view with a solid, featureless panel and no visible handles or doors.
description_view_3: Right side view showing a plain, flat wood grain panel similar to the left side.
